ddls:
CREATE TABLE "discussion_threads" (
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discussion thread */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the discussion thread */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discussion thread */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the thread was created */,
  "last_post_date" TEXT /* Date of the last post in the thread */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies in the thread */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views of the thread */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the thread belongs to */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the thread is locked */,
  "is_pinned" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the thread is pinned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thread_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., member, moderator, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discussion thread the post belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the post was made */,
  "edited" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the post has been edited */,
  "edited_date" TEXT /* Date the post was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_thread_id FOREIGN KEY ("thread_id") REFERENCES discussion_threads ("thread_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being replied to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the reply */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the reply */,
  "reply_date" TEXT /* Date the reply was made */,
  "edited" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the reply has been edited */,
  "edited_date" TEXT /* Date the reply was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thread_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thread_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES thread_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thread_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discussion thread the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thread_tags_thread_id FOREIGN KEY ("thread_id") REFERENCES discussion_threads ("thread_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_badges" (
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each badge */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who earned the badge */,
  "badge_name" TEXT /* Name of the badge */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the badge */,
  "badge_image" TEXT /* URL of the badge image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_badges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_points" (
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each point entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who earned the points */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points earned */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the points earned */,
  "date_earned" TEXT /* Date the points were earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_points_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderator_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderator action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., move thread, ban user) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "target_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user affected by the action (if any) */,
  "target_thread_id" INTEGER /* ID of the thread affected by the action (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderator_actions_target_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderator_actions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderator_actions_target_thread_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_thread_id") REFERENCES discussion_threads ("thread_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the report */,
  "reported_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being reported */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., spam, harassment) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was made */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reports_reported_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("reported_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thread_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thread view */,
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discussion thread being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the thread */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date the thread was viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thread_views_thread_id FOREIGN KEY ("thread_id") REFERENCES discussion_threads ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thread_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
